name: Phoenix.Socket

aliases.name: Socket
aliases.comment: Stores channels, event handlers, and configuration options
aliases.type: { path : String, debug : Bool, channels : Dict String (Channel msg), events : Dict ( String, String ) (Value -> msg), pushes : Dict Int (Push msg), ref : Int, heartbeatIntervalSeconds : Float, withoutHeartbeat : Bool }

values.name: init
values.comment: Initializes a `Socket` with the given path

values.name: join
values.comment:
Joins a channel

    payload = Json.Encode.object [ ("user_id", Json.Encode.string "123") ]
    channel = Channel.init "rooms:lobby" |> Channel.withPayload payload
    (socket_, cmd) = join channel socket
values.type: Channel msg -> Socket msg -> ( Socket msg, Cmd (Msg msg) )

values.name: leave
values.comment:
Leaves a channel

    (socket_, cmd) = leave "rooms:lobby" socket
values.type: String -> Socket msg -> ( Socket msg, Cmd (Msg msg) )

values.name: listen
values.comment: Listens for phoenix messages and converts them into type `msg`
values.type: Socket msg -> (Msg msg -> msg) -> Sub msg

values.name: off
values.comment:
Removes an event handler

    socket
      |> off "new:msg" "rooms:lobby"
      |> off "alert:msg" "rooms:lobby"
values.type: String -> String -> Socket msg -> Socket msg

values.name: on
values.comment:
Registers an event handler

    socket
      |> on "new:msg" "rooms:lobby" ReceiveChatMessage
      |> on "alert:msg" "rooms:lobby" ReceiveAlertMessage
values.type: String -> String -> (Value -> msg) -> Socket msg -> Socket msg

values.name: push
values.comment:
Pushes a message

    push_ = Phoenix.Push.init "new:msg" "rooms:lobby"
    (socket_, cmd) = push push_ socket
values.type: Push msg -> Socket msg -> ( Socket msg, Cmd (Msg msg) )

values.name: update
values.type: Msg msg -> Socket msg -> ( Socket msg, Cmd (Msg msg) )

values.name: withDebug
values.comment: When enabled, prints all incoming Phoenix messages to the console

values.name: withHeartbeatInterval
values.comment:
Sends the heartbeat every interval in seconds

    Default is 30 seconds

aliases.name: Push
aliases.comment: Represents a message being pushed to the server
aliases.type: { event : String, channel : String, payload : Value, onOk : Maybe (Value -> msg), onError : Maybe (Value -> msg) }

values.name: init
values.comment:
Initializes a push with the given event and channel

    init "new:msg" "rooms:lobby"

values.name: onError
values.comment:
Attaches an error handler

    init "new:msg" "rooms:lobby"
      |> onError handlePushError

values.name: onOk
values.comment:
Attaches a success handler

    init "new:msg" "rooms:lobby"
      |> onOk handlePushOk

values.name: withPayload
values.comment:
Attaches a payload

    payload = JE.object [ ("body", JE.string "Hello World!") ]
    init "new:msg" "rooms:lobby"
      |> withPayload payload

name: Phoenix.Channel
comment: @docs Channel, State, init, withPayload, onError, onClose, onJoin, onJoinError, setState

unions.name: State
unions.comment: All possible states a channel can be in

aliases.name: Channel
aliases.type: { name : String, payload : Value, state : State, onClose : Maybe (Value -> msg), onError : Maybe (Value -> msg), onJoin : Maybe (Value -> msg), onJoinError : Maybe (Value -> msg), joinRef : Int, leaveRef : Int }

values.name: setState
values.comment: Sets the state of a channel. Internal use only.

values.name: withPayload
values.comment:
Attaches a payload that's used for authentication

    payload = JE.object [ ("user_id", JE.string "123") ]
    init "rooms:lobby"
      |> withPayload payload
